markdown.markdown:
Sean Maden is a bioinformatics researcher with expertise in epigenetics and 
analysis of DNA methylation microarrays. He earned 
his Ph.D. in Computational Biology from the Department of Biomedical Engineering 
at Oregon Health & Science University. 

Sean is interested in open-access research projects for data science. He develops 
R/Bioconductor software packages (e.g. [recountmethylation](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/recountmethylation.html) 
and [lute](https://github.com/metamaden/lute)), 
analysis workflows (e.g.
[recountmethylation_instance](https://github.com/metamaden/recountmethylation_instance) 
and [r-nf_deconvolution](https://github.com/metamaden/r-nf_deconvolution)), 
and 
other resources (e.g. 
[geoarraydigest](https://github.com/metamaden/geoarraydigest), [methyPre](https://github.com/metamaden/methyPre), 
[cgageR](https://github.com/metamaden/cgageR), and 
[cgmappeR](https://github.com/metamaden/cgmappeR)) for research.
